column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `tech` extension <-> ISO/IEC 22989:2022 (Information technology - AI - AI concepts and terminology) term alignments. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7, single-step prompt against DPV 2.3 tech terms and the lmodel iso22989 schema). Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` per the Semantic Mapping Vocabulary and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
